name: deepseek-compat-kit
description: Compatibility and diagnostics for DeepSeek V4 tool-calling agents.

scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm test && npm run test:examples
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run verify && npm run pack:check
scripts.test:examples: node --check examples/openai-js/index.mjs && node --check examples/mock-upstream/server.mjs && node --check examples/mock-upstream/smoke.mjs && node --check examples/openai-js-tool-calls/smoke.mjs
scripts.test:openai-js-tool-calls: npm --prefix examples/openai-js-tool-calls ci && npm --prefix examples/openai-js-tool-calls run smoke
scripts.demo:openai-js-tool-calls: npm --prefix examples/openai-js-tool-calls install && npm --prefix examples/openai-js-tool-calls run smoke
